simpleExplanation.title: Marketing mix — explained simply

faq.q: Is this Business Studies Marketing mix lesson free?

Scroll to the past-paper section on this page — we surface real Cambridge questions tagged to 3.3 from our mark-scheme library.

sections.content: Welcome to your **free Business Studies** lesson on **Marketing mix** (3.3). This is syllabus point 3.3 on **Paper 2 (Case Study)** — structured like a premium revision course, with past-paper practice built in.

items: Master the vocabulary examiners use in mark schemes for Marketing mix

Use “Explain simpler” below if the main lesson feels too advanced

sections.content: Cambridge 7115 rewards answers tied to the case business — name the firm, quote stimulus data, and balance advantages against disadvantages. On Paper 2 (Case Study), Marketing mix often appears as part of a longer structured or case question.
